name: spoo · business
description: Redirects, URL creates, geo, owners, devices. Refresh 5m.

query.apl:
['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect"
| summarize count()

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_created"
| summarize count()

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(country)
| summarize dcount(country)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded"
| summarize total = count(), bots = countif(is_bot == true)
| extend bot_rate = round(iff(total > 0, 100.0 * bots / total, 0.0), 2)
| project bot_rate

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect"
| summarize redirects = count() by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_created"
| summarize creates = count() by bin_auto(_time)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(country)
| summarize hits = count() by country
| top 20 by hits

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(country)
| summarize hits = count() by country
| top 5 by hits
| project country
| join kind=inner (
    ['spoo-prod']
    | where event == "url_redirect"
    | summarize count() by bin_auto(_time), country
) on country
| project _time, country, count_

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(short_code)
| summarize hits = count() by short_code
| top 20 by hits

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(long_url_domain)
| summarize hits = count() by long_url_domain
| top 20 by hits

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_created" and isnotnull(long_url_domain)
| summarize creates = count() by long_url_domain
| top 20 by creates

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_redirect" and isnotnull(schema)
| summarize count() by tostring(schema)

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded"
| extend kind = iff(is_bot == true, "bot", "human")
| summarize count() by kind

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "request_completed" and isnotnull(auth_kind)
| summarize count() by auth_kind

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded" and isnotnull(referrer_domain)
| summarize clicks = count() by referrer_domain
| top 20 by clicks

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded" and isnotnull(browser)
| summarize clicks = count() by browser
| top 15 by clicks

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded" and isnotnull(os)
| summarize clicks = count() by os
| top 15 by clicks

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded" and is_bot == true and isnotnull(bot_name)
| summarize hits = count() by bot_name
| top 20 by hits

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "click_recorded" and isnotnull(owner_id)
| summarize clicks = count() by owner_id
| top 10 by clicks

['spoo-prod']
| where event == "url_created"
| summarize
    pwd = countif(has_password == true),
    max_clicks = countif(isnotnull(max_clicks)),
    block_bots = countif(block_bots == true),
    expiration = countif(has_expiration == true),
    private = countif(private_stats == true),
    custom_alias = countif(alias_custom == true)
| project pwd, max_clicks, block_bots, expiration, private, custom_alias
